subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Upon thee be the glory of God, His grace, His mercy and His bounty. Thou hast been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One. Praise be unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه علیک بهاء الله و فضله و رحمته و عطائه ذکرت نزد مظلوم مذکور حمد خدا را
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @consolation and comfort
